name: 6) Thai Shrimp Soup
method: Peeled and deveined uncooked shrimp - 1 pound
Peeled and deveined uncooked shrimp - 1 pound
Heat oil in a Dutch oven, then sauté the onion until soft.
Heat oil in a Dutch oven, then sauté the onion until soft.
Add water, lemongrass, curry leaves, ginger, fish sauce, brown sugar, and chicken broth. Let it boil. When it starts boiling, reduce heat and add the edamame and shrimp. Cook for 5-6 mins, uncovered.
Add water, lemongrass, curry leaves, ginger, fish sauce, brown sugar, and chicken broth. Let it boil. When it starts boiling, reduce heat and add the edamame and shrimp. Cook for 5-6 mins, uncovered.
Add coconut milk, sorghum, bamboo shoots, basil, cilantro, lime juice, and lime peel. Let it boil. Discard the lemongrass before serving.
Add coconut milk, sorghum, bamboo shoots, basil, cilantro, lime juice, and lime peel. Let it boil. Discard the lemongrass before serving.
